title: Naturalistic grade
description: Balance skin tones and locations while retaining believable contrast and available-light character.
solves: Images that feel inconsistent without needing a conspicuous look.

title: High-contrast noir
description: Deepen blacks, isolate highlights, and build graphic separation around faces and architecture.
solves: A dark genre film whose images lack threat and visual authority.

title: Warm nostalgia
description: Shape highlights and production colors toward warmth while keeping memory from becoming sentimental haze.
solves: Past-tense material that needs emotional cohesion.

title: Cold urban palette
description: Control warmth and emphasize steel, concrete, and winter light across city locations.
solves: An urban story whose environment lacks a coherent emotional pressure.

title: Desaturated realism
description: Reduce color intensity selectively to foreground faces, weather, and material texture.
solves: A realism-driven film that looks too polished or decorative.

title: Saturated genre look
description: Push controlled color contrast to make the film's genre identity immediate and memorable.
solves: A genre film that lacks a strong visual marketing signature.
